                    <path id="loading-line-bkgd" d="M0,0 L150,0" fill="none" stroke="#F3F2F1" stroke-width="150"></path>
                    <style>
                        #loading-line-main {
                            stroke-dasharray: 150;
                            stroke-dashoffset: 150;
                        }
                        @keyframes animateLine {
                            to {
                                stroke-dashoffset: 0;
                            }
                        }
                        #loading-line-main {
                            animation: animateLine 2s linear infinite;
                        }
                    </style>

developer","refNum":"226360-36-2026-05-10","expirationDate":null,"sponsoredEmployerKey":null,"tracking":{"__typename":"JobTrackingResult","jobClick":{"__typename":"JobTrackingJobClickResult","url":"http:\u002F\u002Fwww.indeed.com\u002Frc\u002Fclk?jk=fd6a2330b0fb1610&bb=txN_3YH7l4ahe315gIWf4raC5Nxu2Im1Z2j0y9gNqmFTBH54iOtrch_UlFw8Thed0fh3iR3owE7F2OzPgHzhhgM0sdIo6sV0&xkcb=SoCk67M3jIO1S92Ehh0LbzkdCdPP"}},"source":{"__typename":"JobSource","key":"AAAAASh\u002FtRuyeRxlq+\u002FN2CyrxFf+XjOVPOH9fKj5vngyWrLngB4EFQ==","name":"Peoplevisor LLC"},"feed":{"__typename":"JobFeed","key":"AAAAAQl76B+IMEcPmvCMfvjYdO\u002F8JtwUgjzL7DrA\u002F8zwFQ6XKxR0uA==","isDradis":false,"feedSourceType":"EMPLOYER"},"url":"https:\u002F\u002Fpeoplevisor.bamboohr.com\u002Fcareers\u002F36?source=indeed&src=indeed&postedDate=2026-05-10","dateOnIndeed":1778383078027,"description":{"__typename":"JobDescription","html":"\u003Cdiv>\u003Cp>Peoplevisor has an exciting opportunity for an experienced Salesforce Commerce Cloud (Demandware) Developer. In this role, the candidate will develop, assist, and lead delivery teams in building projects within Salesforce Commerce Cloud. This candidate is going to have one of the most critical roles in a successful software delivery team, possessing a broad variety of technical and soft skills.\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n\u003Cp>\n \u003Cb>KEY EXPECTATIONS\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n\u003Cul>\n\u003Cli>Implement new features using Salesforce Commerce Cloud (Demandware) scripting language based on JavaScript\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Implement front-end features using jQuery library\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Create and maintain code documentation\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Debug and troubleshoot software defects\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Implements Digital Consumer experiences based on a foundation of SFCC (Salesforce commerce cloud) to meet expected quality standards.\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Participates in Agile sprints and design, develop, test and implement changes as defined by business requirements.\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Implement proofs of concept to prove any new technologies or integration scenarios and identify customization's needed to SFCC platform for meeting client requirements.\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Integrate commerce cloud with 3rd party\u002Fback-end systems leveraging link cartridge\u002FOCAPI\u002Fcustom services while ensuring scalability, performance and coding guidelines.\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Diagnose and solve technical problems during implementation and support phases in a timely manner.\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Help team\u002Fclient with Business Manager configuration and administration.\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Build reusable cartridge\u002Fcomponents.\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Implement build and release management using CI\u002FCD strategies (leveraging tools like Jenkins and\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>DevOps practices), implement Mocha\u002FChai unit and functional test cases in order to reduce costs while ensuring quality.\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Lead discussions with internal business partners to identify needs and translate business requirements into detail functional specifications and technical solutions.\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Communicate efficiently and accurately with the Project Manager and report any progress and\u002For delays.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003C\u002Ful>\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n\u003Cp>\u003Cb>\nDESIRED SKILLS AND EXPERIENCE\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n\u003Cul>\n\u003Cli>Salesforce Certified Commerce Cloud Digital Developer Required\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Computer Science or related field\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>3+ years of developer experience within the Salesforce Commerce Cloud (Demandware)\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>2+ years of experience in a client facing role\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Strong knowledge of JavaScript (both server and client side) and at least one other major programming language\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Experience working in all phases of the software development life-cycle from requirements gathering to final delivery and support\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Solid understanding of basic eCommerce concepts, such as catalog architecture, pricing and inventory management strategies, payment processors, and technologies that support a successful eCommerce strategy such as PIM, OMS, and ERP\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Experience with supporting and\u002For implementing public-facing eCommerce websites\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Strong experience on major eCommerce platforms\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Self-driven and motivated\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Exceptional problem-solving skills and a fantastic attention to detail\u003C\u002Fli>\u003C\u002Ful>\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n\u003Cp>\n \u003Cb>\u003Ci>Employer&rsquo;s Rights:\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n\u003Cp>\u003Ci>\nPeoplevisor, LLC. has the right to revise this job description at any time. This job description is not a contract for employment. This job description does not list all the duties of the job. You may be asked by your supervisors or managers to perform other duties. You will be evaluated in part based upon your performance of the tasks listed in this job description.\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n\u003Cp>\n \u003Cb>\u003Ci>Equal Opportunity Statement:\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n\u003Cp>\u003Ci>\nAll qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, or status as a Vietnam or disabled veteran.\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n\u003Cp>\u003Ci>\nApplications for employment in the US must have work authorization that does not now or in the future require sponsorship of a visa for employment authorization in the United States and with Peoplevisor, LLC.\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fp>\u003C\u002Fdiv>","text":"Peoplevisor has an exciting opportunity for an experienced Salesforce Commerce Cloud (Demandware) Developer. In this role, the candidate will develop, assist, and lead delivery teams in building projects within Salesforce Commerce Cloud. This candidate is going to have one of the most critical roles in a successful software delivery team, possessing a broad variety of technical and soft skills.\n\n KEY EXPECTATIONS\n\nImplement new features using Salesforce Commerce Cloud (Demandware) scripting language based on JavaScript\nImplement front-end features using jQuery library\nCreate and maintain code documentation\nDebug and troubleshoot software defects\nImplements Digital Consumer experiences based on a foundation of SFCC (Salesforce commerce cloud) to meet expected quality standards.\nParticipates in Agile sprints and design, develop, test and implement changes as defined by business requirements.\nImplement proofs of concept to prove any new technologies or integration scenarios and identify customization's needed to SFCC platform for meeting client requirements.\nIntegrate commerce cloud with 3rd party\u002Fback-end systems leveraging link cartridge\u002FOCAPI\u002Fcustom services while ensuring scalability, performance and coding guidelines.\nDiagnose and solve technical problems during implementation and support phases in a timely manner.\nHelp team\u002Fclient with Business Manager configuration and administration.\nBuild reusable cartridge\u002Fcomponents.\nImplement build and release management using CI\u002FCD strategies (leveraging tools like Jenkins and\nDevOps practices), implement Mocha\u002FChai unit and functional test cases in order to reduce costs while ensuring quality.\nLead discussions with internal business partners to identify needs and translate business requirements into detail functional specifications and technical solutions.\nCommunicate efficiently and accurately with the Project Manager and report any progress and\u002For delays.\n\nDESIRED SKILLS AND EXPERIENCE\n\nSalesforce Certified Commerce Cloud Digital Developer Required\nBachelor’s Degree in Computer Science or related field\n3+ years of developer experience within the Salesforce Commerce Cloud (Demandware)\n2+ years of experience in a client facing role\nStrong knowledge of JavaScript (both server and client side) and at least one other major programming language\nExperience working in all phases of the software development life-cycle from requirements gathering to final delivery and support\nSolid understanding of basic eCommerce concepts, such as catalog architecture, pricing and inventory management strategies, payment processors, and technologies that support a successful eCommerce strategy such as PIM, OMS, and ERP\nExperience with supporting and\u002For implementing public-facing eCommerce websites\nStrong experience on major eCommerce platforms\nSelf-driven and motivated\nExceptional problem-solving skills and a fantastic attention to detail\n\n Employer’s Rights:\n\nPeoplevisor, LLC. has the right to revise this job description at any time. This job description is not a contract for employment. This job description does not list all the duties of the job. You may be asked by your supervisors or managers to perform other duties. You will be evaluated in part based upon your performance of the tasks listed in this job description.\n\n Equal Opportunity Statement:\n\nAll qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, or status as a Vietnam or disabled veteran.\n\nApplications for employment in the US must have work authorization that does not now or in the future require sponsorship of a visa for employment authorization in the United States and with Peoplevisor, $shouldQuerySavedJob: Boolean!, $shouldQueryTitleNorm: Boolean!, $shouldQueryCompanyFields: Boolean!, $shouldQuerySalary: Boolean!, $shouldQueryIndeedApplyLink: Boolean!, $shouldQueryParentEmployer: Boolean!, $shouldQuerySentiment: Boolean!, $shouldIncludeFragmentZone: Boolean!, $shouldQueryMatchComparison: Boolean!, $shouldQueryApplicantInsights: Boolean!, $shouldQueryContactEmail: Boolean!, $shouldQueryEmployerOutreachEngagements: Boolean! = false, $shouldQueryApplyRateLimit: Boolean! = false, $shouldQueryJapanInternshipMetadata: Boolean! = false, $source: String!, $mobvjtk: String!, $continueUrl: String!, $spn: Boolean!, $jobDataInput: JobDataInput!, $resumeEngagementsAfter: String = null, $resumeEngagementsInput: FindResumeEngagementsInput! = {}, $clientMeta: String) {\n  jobData(input: $jobDataInput) {\n    __typename\n    results {\n      __typename\n      trackingKey\n      job {\n        __typename\n        key\n        ...jobDataFields\n        ...titleNormFields@include(if: $shouldQueryTitleNorm)\n        ...savedJobFields@include(if: $shouldQuerySavedJob)\n        ...companyFields@include(if: $shouldQueryCompanyFields)\n        ...parentEmployerFields@include(if: $shouldQueryParentEmployer)\n        jobSearchMobileMigrationData @include(if: $shouldQuerySentiment) {\n          __typename\n          knownUserSentimentIdMap {\n            __typename\n            id\n            suid\n          }\n          userStringDislikedPreferences {\n            __typename\n            uid\n          }\n          userMinimumPayPreferences {\n            __typename\n            currency\n            payAmount\n            salaryType\n          }\n          preferencesFetchStatus\n          paySentiment\n        }\n        jobTypes: attributes(customClass: \"BM62A\") {\n          __typename\n          key\n          label\n          sentiment @include(if: $shouldQuerySentiment)\n        }\n        shiftAndSchedule: attributes(customClass: \"BTSWR\") {\n          __typename\n          key\n          label\n          sentiment @include(if: $shouldQuerySentiment)\n        }\n        compensation @include(if: $shouldQuerySalary) {\n          __typename\n          key\n        }\n        indeedApply @include(if: $shouldQueryIndeedApplyLink) {\n          __typename\n          applyLink(property: INDEED, trackingKeys: {mobvjtk : $mobvjtk}, continueUrl: $continueUrl, spn: $spn, clientMeta: $clientMeta, source: $source) {\n            __typename\n            url\n            iaUid\n          }\n        }\n        ...japanInternshipFields@include(if: $shouldQueryJapanInternshipMetadata)\n        ...ViewJobFragmentZone@include(if: $shouldIncludeFragmentZone)\n        applicants @include(if: $shouldQueryApplicantInsights) {\n          __typename\n          hasInsights\n          ...ApplicantDemographicsFields\n        }\n      }\n      matchComparisonResult @include(if: $shouldQueryMatchComparison) {\n        __typename\n        attributeComparisons {\n          __typename\n          jobProvenance\n          attribute {\n            __typename\n            interestedParty\n            label\n            lastModified\n            suid\n            profileAttributeTypeSuid\n          }\n          jobRequirementStrength\n          jsProvenance\n          matchType\n        }\n        encouragementToApply {\n          __typename\n          score\n          strategy\n          trafficLight\n        }\n        occupationComparisons {\n          __typename\n          jsProvenance\n          matchType\n          occupation {\n            __typename\n            label\n            suid\n          }\n        }\n        attributeIdsMapping {\n          __typename\n          id\n          suid\n          sentiment\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n  cogsCheckEligibility(input: {jobKey : $jobKeyString}) @include(if: $shouldQueryCogsEligibility) {\n    __typename\n    error\n    isEligible\n  }\n  jobSeekerProfile @include(if: $shouldQueryApplicantInsights) {\n    __typename\n    profile {\n      __typename\n      subscription {\n        __typename\n        status\n      }\n      jsProPremiumAccess {\n        __typename\n        applicantInsights {\n          __typename\n          access\n          branding\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n  findResumeEngagements(first: 50, after: $resumeEngagementsAfter, input: $resumeEngagementsInput) @include(if: $shouldQueryEmployerOutreachEngagements) {\n    __typename\n    engagements {\n      __typename\n      id\n      sender {\n        __typename\n        name\n        email\n        id\n      }\n      status\n      createdDate\n      type\n      recipient {\n        __typename\n        id\n        email\n        phoneNumber\n      }\n      job {\n        __typename\n        title\n        company\n        description\n        employerJobId\n        htmlDescription\n      }\n      conversation {\n        __typename\n        key\n        initialMessage {\n          __typename\n          id\n          textBody\n          htmlBody\n        }\n      }\n      statusHistory {\n        __typename\n        status\n        timestamp\n        modifiedDate\n      }\n      feedback {\n        __typename\n        declineReason\n        comment\n      }\n      fullApplyRequested\n    }\n  }\n  assessRiskForContexts(input: {contexts : [JS_APPLY_START_RATE_LIMIT]}) @include(if: $shouldQueryApplyRateLimit) {\n    __typename\n    action\n    limitInfo {\n      __typename\n      limit\n      remaining\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nfragment jobDataFields on Job {\n  __typename\n  title\n  sourceEmployerName\n  datePublished\n  expired\n  language\n  normalizedTitle\n  refNum\n  expirationDate\n  sponsoredEmployerKey\n  tracking {\n    __typename\n    jobClick {\n      __typename\n      url\n    }\n  }\n  source {\n    __typename\n    key\n    name\n  }\n  feed {\n    __typename\n    key\n    isDradis\n    feedSourceType\n  }\n  url\n  dateOnIndeed\n  description {\n    __typename\n    html\n    text\n    semanticSegments {\n      __typename\n      content\n      header\n      label\n    }\n  }\n  location {\n    __typename\n    countryCode\n    admin1Code\n    admin1Name\n    admin2Code\n    admin2Name\n    admin3Code\n    admin3Name\n    admin4Code\n    admin4Name\n    city\n    postalCode\n    latitude\n    longitude\n    streetAddress\n    fullAddress\n    formatted {\n      __typename\n      long\n      short\n    }\n  }\n  occupations {\n    __typename\n    key\n    label\n  }\n  occupationMostLikelySuids: occupations(occupationOption: MOST_LIKELY) {\n    __typename\n    key\n  }\n  benefits: attributes(customClass: \"SXMYH\") {\n    __typename\n    key\n    label\n  }\n  socialInsurance: attributes(customClass: \"KTQQ7\") {\n    __typename\n    key\n    label\n  }\n  workingSystem: attributes(customClass: \"TY4DY\") {\n    __typename\n    key\n    label\n  }\n  requiredDocumentsCategorizedAttributes: attributes(customClass: \"PQCTE\") {\n    __typename\n    key\n    label\n  }\n  indeedApply {\n    __typename\n    key\n    scopes\n  }\n  attributes {\n    __typename\n    key\n    label\n  }\n  employerProvidedAttributes: attributes(sources: [EMPLOYER]) {\n    __typename\n    key\n    label\n  }\n  employerProvidedOccupations: occupations(sources: [EMPLOYER], occupationOption: MOST_SPECIFIC) {\n    __typename\n    label\n  }\n  hiringDemand {\n    __typename\n    isUrgentHire\n    isHighVolumeHiring\n  }\n  thirdPartyTrackingUrls\n  jobSearchMobileMigrationData {\n    __typename\n    advertiserId\n    jobTypeId\n    applyEmail\n    applyUrl\n    contactEmail @include(if: $shouldQueryContactEmail)\n    contactPhone\n    isNoUniqueUrl\n    urlRewriteRule\n    mapDisplayType\n    jobTags\n    locCountry\n    waldoVisibilityLevel\n    isKnownSponsoredOnDesktop\n    isKnownSponsoredOnMobile\n    tpiaAdvNum\n    tpiaApiToken\n    tpiaCoverLetter\n    tpiaEmail\n    tpiaFinishAppUrl\n    tpiaJobCompanyName\n    tpiaJobId\n    tpiaJobLocation\n    tpiaJobMeta\n    tpiaJobTitle\n    tpiaLocale\n    tpiaName\n    tpiaPhone\n    tpiaPostUrl\n    tpiaPresent\n    tpiaResume\n    tpiaResumeFieldsOptional\n    tpiaResumeFieldsRequired\n    tpiaScreenerQuestions\n    iaVisibility\n    hasPreciseLocation\n    algoKey\n  }\n  jobStats {\n    __typename\n    organicApplyStarts\n  }\n  isRepost\n  isLatestPost\n  isPlacement\n  photos {\n    __typename\n    w400\n    w800\n    w1600\n    altText\n  }\n}\n\nfragment titleNormFields on Job {\n  __typename\n  normalizedTitle\n  displayTitle\n}\n\nfragment savedJobFields on Job {\n  __typename\n  savedJob {\n    __typename\n    state\n    currentStateTime\n    applicationDraft {\n      __typename\n      expiryTime\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nfragment companyFields on Job {\n  __typename\n  employer {\n    __typename\n    key\n    tier\n    relativeCompanyPageUrl\n    dossier {\n      __typename\n      images {\n        __typename\n        rectangularLogoUrl\n        headerImageUrls {\n          __typename\n          url1960x400\n        }\n        squareLogoUrls {\n          __typename\n          url256\n        }\n      }\n    }\n    ugcStats {\n      __typename\n      globalReviewCount\n      ratings {\n        __typename\n        overallRating {\n          __typename\n          count\n          value\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nfragment parentEmployerFields on Job {\n  __typename\n  employer {\n    __typename\n    subsidiaryOptOutStatusV2\n    parentEmployer {\n      __typename\n      name\n      subsidiaryOptOutStatusV2\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nfragment japanInternshipFields on Job {\n  __typename\n  internship {\n    __typename\n    periodRange {\n      __typename\n      periodMin\n      periodMax\n    }\n    startMonth {\n      __typename\n      year\n      month\n    }\n  }\n  applicationDueDate\n  graduationYear\n  programType: attributes(keys: [\"XZD3C\", \"BWM3E\"], sources: [EMPLOYER]) {\n    __typename\n    key\n    label\n  }\n}\n\nfragment ViewJobFragmentZone on Job {\n  key\n  __typename\n}\n\nfragment ApplicantDemographicsFields on Applicants {\n  __typename\n  count {\n    __typename\n    total\n    last24h\n  }\n  workExperience {\n    __typename\n    title\n    pct\n  }\n  education {\n    __typename\n    title\n    pct\n  }\n  skills {\n    __typename\n    title\n    pct\n  }\n  certificates {\n    __typename\n    title\n    pct\n  }\n  previewInsight {\n    __typename\n    title\n    pct\n  }\n}\n","trackingKey":"1jo83ekfu2k04h00","variables":{"jobKeyString":"fd6a2330b0fb1610","shouldQueryCogsEligibility":false,"shouldQuerySavedJob":false,"shouldQueryTitleNorm":false,"shouldQueryCompanyFields":true,"shouldQuerySalary":true,"shouldQueryIndeedApplyLink":false,"shouldQueryParentEmployer":true,"shouldQuerySentiment":false,"shouldIncludeFragmentZone":false,"shouldQueryMatchComparison":true,"shouldQueryApplicantInsights":false,"shouldQueryContactEmail":false,"shouldQueryEmployerOutreachEngagements":false,"shouldQueryApplyRateLimit":false,"shouldQueryJapanInternshipMetadata":false,"source":"idd","mobvjtk":"1jo83ekfml03i800","continueUrl":"http:\u002F\u002Fwww.indeed.com\u002Fviewjob?xkcb=SoAT67M3jIO1VkwpTh0LbzkdCdPP&from=tp-semfirstjob&jk=fd6a2330b0fb1610&viewtype=embedded&continueUrl=%2Fjobs%3Fq%3Dsoftware%2Bdeveloper%26fromage%3D1%26start%3D0%26sort%3Ddate%26l%3DUnited%2BStates&tk=1jo83ek5jl03i800&applied=1","spn":false,"jobDataInput":{"jobKeys":["fd6a2330b0fb1610"],"useSearchlessPrice":false},"resumeEngagementsInput":{"startTime":"2026-04-10T04:48:41.462940302Z"},"clientMeta":"{&quot;vtk&quot;:&quot;1jo83ekfml03i800&quot;,&quot;tk&quot;:&quot;1jo83ek5jl03i800&quot;}"}},"indeedApplyButtonContainer":{"applicationDueDateLabel":null,"disabled":false,"employerResponsiveCard":null,"hasMessage":false,"indeedApplyAttributes":"data-indeed-apply-jobCountry='US' LLC","companyOverviewLink":"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.indeed.com\u002Fcmp\u002FPeoplevisor-LLC?campaignid=mobvjcmp&from=mobviewjob&tk=1jo83ekfml03i800&fromjk=fd6a2330b0fb1610","companyReviewLink":"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.indeed.com\u002Fcmp\u002FPeoplevisor-LLC\u002Freviews?campaignid=mobvjcmp&cmpratingc=mobviewjob&from=mobviewjob&tk=1jo83ekfml03i800&fromjk=fd6a2330b0fb1610&jt=Salesforce+Commerce+Cloud+and+Demandware+Developer","companyReviewModel":null,"employerActivity":null,"employerProvidedOccupations":[],"employerResponsiveCardModel":null,"encryptedFccCompanyId":null,"formattedLocation":"Irving, 75039","hideRating":false,"isCondensedRating":true,"isDesktopApplyButtonSticky":false,"isSimpleVjImproveActive":true,"isSimplifiedHeader":false,"jobFlairLabelModel":null,"jobNormTitle":null,"jobTitle":"Salesforce Commerce Cloud and Demandware Developer","jobTypes":null,"location":null,"openCompanyLinksInNewTab":false,"parentCompanyName":null,"ratingsModel":null,"recentSearch":null,"remoteLocation":false,"remoteWorkModel":null,"salaryCurrency":null,"salaryMax":null,"salaryMin":null,"salaryType":null,"subtitle":"Peoplevisor LLC - Irving, TX 75039","tagModels":null,"taxonomyAttributes":null,"viewJobDisplay":"DESKTOP_EMBEDDED"},"jobMetadataHeaderModel":{"jobType":"Full-time"},"jobTagModel":null,"resumeEvaluationResult":null,"sanitizedJobDescription":"\u003Cdiv>\n \u003Cp>Peoplevisor has an exciting opportunity for an experienced Salesforce Commerce Cloud (Demandware) Developer. In this role, the candidate will develop, assist, and lead delivery teams in building projects within Salesforce Commerce Cloud. This candidate is going to have one of the most critical roles in a successful software delivery team, possessing a broad variety of technical and soft skills.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb>KEY EXPECTATIONS\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Implement new features using Salesforce Commerce Cloud (Demandware) scripting language based on JavaScript\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Implement front-end features using jQuery library\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Create and maintain code documentation\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Debug and troubleshoot software defects\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Implements Digital Consumer experiences based on a foundation of SFCC (Salesforce commerce cloud) to meet expected quality standards.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Participates in Agile sprints and design, develop, test and implement changes as defined by business requirements.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Implement proofs of concept to prove any new technologies or integration scenarios and identify customization's needed to SFCC platform for meeting client requirements.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Integrate commerce cloud with 3rd party\u002Fback-end systems leveraging link cartridge\u002FOCAPI\u002Fcustom services while ensuring scalability, performance and coding guidelines.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Diagnose and solve technical problems during implementation and support phases in a timely manner.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Help team\u002Fclient with Business Manager configuration and administration.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Build reusable cartridge\u002Fcomponents.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Implement build and release management using CI\u002FCD strategies (leveraging tools like Jenkins and\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>DevOps practices), implement Mocha\u002FChai unit and functional test cases in order to reduce costs while ensuring quality.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Lead discussions with internal business partners to identify needs and translate business requirements into detail functional specifications and technical solutions.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Communicate efficiently and accurately with the Project Manager and report any progress and\u002For delays.\u003C\u002Fli>\n \u003C\u002Ful>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb> DESIRED SKILLS AND EXPERIENCE\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Salesforce Certified Commerce Cloud Digital Developer Required\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science or related field\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>3+ years of developer experience within the Salesforce Commerce Cloud (Demandware)\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>2+ years of experience in a client facing role\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Strong knowledge of JavaScript (both server and client side) and at least one other major programming language\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Experience working in all phases of the software development life-cycle from requirements gathering to final delivery and support\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Solid understanding of basic eCommerce concepts, such as catalog architecture, pricing and inventory management strategies, payment processors, and technologies that support a successful eCommerce strategy such as PIM, OMS, and ERP\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Experience with supporting and\u002For implementing public-facing eCommerce websites\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Strong experience on major eCommerce platforms\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Self-driven and motivated\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Exceptional problem-solving skills and a fantastic attention to detail\u003C\u002Fli>\n \u003C\u002Ful>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb>\u003Ci>Employer’s Rights:\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Ci> Peoplevisor, LLC. has the right to revise this job description at any time. This job description is not a contract for employment. This job description does not list all the duties of the job. You may be asked by your supervisors or managers to perform other duties. You will be evaluated in part based upon your performance of the tasks listed in this job description.\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb>\u003Ci>Equal Opportunity Statement:\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Ci> All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, or status as a Vietnam or disabled veteran.\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Ci> Applications for employment in the US must have work authorization that does not now or in the future require sponsorship of a visa for employment authorization in the United States and with Peoplevisor, LLC.\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fp>\n\u003C\u002Fdiv>","showExpiredHeader":false,"structuredDataJobSummaryModel":null,"tagModels":null,"viewJobDisplay":"DESKTOP_EMBEDDED"},"sectionedJobInfoModel":null},"jobKey":"fd6a2330b0fb1610","jobLanguage":"en","jobLocation":"Irving, 1);display:inline-flex;inline-size:auto;padding-block-start:0.5625rem;padding-block-end:0.5625rem;min-block-size:2.75rem;color:var(--ifl-colors-foreground-strong);background-color:var(--ifl-colors-background-action-weak);}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs::-moz-focus-inner{border:0;}@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs{box-sizing:border-box;background:none;appearance:none;text-align:start;text-decoration:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;user-select:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative;margin-block-start:0;margin-block-end:0;margin-inline-start:0;margin-inline-end:0;padding-inline-start:1rem;padding-inline-end:1rem;line-height:1.5;font-family:\\u0027Indeed Sans\\u0027,\\u0027Noto Sans\\u0027,\\u0027Helvetica Neue\\u0027,Helvetica,Arial,\\u0027Liberation Sans\\u0027,Roboto,Noto,sans-serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;border-radius:0.75rem;transition:border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1),background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1),opacity 200ms cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1),box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1),color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1),z-index 200ms cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1);display:inline-flex;inline-size:auto;padding-block-start:0.5625rem;padding-block-end:0.5625rem;min-block-size:2.75rem;color:var(--ifl-colors-foreground-strong);background-color:var(--ifl-colors-background-action-weak);}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs::-moz-focus-inner{border:0;}@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs{transition:none;}}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs:disabled{opacity:0.4;pointer-events:none;}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs:focus-visible{outline:none;box-shadow:var(--ifl-shadows-focus);}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs[aria-disabled=\\u0027true\\u0027]{cursor:default;}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs:visited{color:var(--ifl-colors-foreground-strong);}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs:hover:not([aria-disabled=\\u0027true\\u0027]){color:var(--ifl-colors-foreground-strong);background-color:var(--ifl-colors-background-action-weak-hover);}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs:active:not([aria-disabled=\\u0027true\\u0027]){color:var(--ifl-colors-foreground-strong);box-shadow:var(--ifl-shadows-inset);background-color:var(--ifl-colors-background-action-weak-active);}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs[aria-disabled=\\u0027true\\u0027]{background-color:rgba(243,242,241,0.4);color:rgba(45,45,45,0.4);}\\u003C\\u002Fstyle\\u003E\\u003Cbutton 75039","tagModels":null,"taxonomyAttributes":null,"viewJobDisplay":"DESKTOP_EMBEDDED"},"jobMetadataHeaderModel":{"jobType":"Full-time"},"jobTagModel":null,"resumeEvaluationResult":null,"sanitizedJobDescription":"\u003Cdiv>\n \u003Cp>Peoplevisor has an exciting opportunity for an experienced Salesforce Commerce Cloud (Demandware) Developer. In this role, the candidate will develop, assist, and lead delivery teams in building projects within Salesforce Commerce Cloud. This candidate is going to have one of the most critical roles in a successful software delivery team, possessing a broad variety of technical and soft skills.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb>KEY EXPECTATIONS\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Implement new features using Salesforce Commerce Cloud (Demandware) scripting language based on JavaScript\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Implement front-end features using jQuery library\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Create and maintain code documentation\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Debug and troubleshoot software defects\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Implements Digital Consumer experiences based on a foundation of SFCC (Salesforce commerce cloud) to meet expected quality standards.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Participates in Agile sprints and design, develop, test and implement changes as defined by business requirements.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Implement proofs of concept to prove any new technologies or integration scenarios and identify customization's needed to SFCC platform for meeting client requirements.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Integrate commerce cloud with 3rd party\u002Fback-end systems leveraging link cartridge\u002FOCAPI\u002Fcustom services while ensuring scalability, performance and coding guidelines.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Diagnose and solve technical problems during implementation and support phases in a timely manner.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Help team\u002Fclient with Business Manager configuration and administration.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Build reusable cartridge\u002Fcomponents.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Implement build and release management using CI\u002FCD strategies (leveraging tools like Jenkins and\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>DevOps practices), implement Mocha\u002FChai unit and functional test cases in order to reduce costs while ensuring quality.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Lead discussions with internal business partners to identify needs and translate business requirements into detail functional specifications and technical solutions.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Communicate efficiently and accurately with the Project Manager and report any progress and\u002For delays.\u003C\u002Fli>\n \u003C\u002Ful>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb> DESIRED SKILLS AND EXPERIENCE\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Salesforce Certified Commerce Cloud Digital Developer Required\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science or related field\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>3+ years of developer experience within the Salesforce Commerce Cloud (Demandware)\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>2+ years of experience in a client facing role\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Strong knowledge of JavaScript (both server and client side) and at least one other major programming language\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Experience working in all phases of the software development life-cycle from requirements gathering to final delivery and support\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Solid understanding of basic eCommerce concepts, such as catalog architecture, pricing and inventory management strategies, payment processors, and technologies that support a successful eCommerce strategy such as PIM, OMS, and ERP\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Experience with supporting and\u002For implementing public-facing eCommerce websites\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Strong experience on major eCommerce platforms\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Self-driven and motivated\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Exceptional problem-solving skills and a fantastic attention to detail\u003C\u002Fli>\n \u003C\u002Ful>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb>\u003Ci>Employer’s Rights:\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Ci> Peoplevisor, LLC. has the right to revise this job description at any time. This job description is not a contract for employment. This job description does not list all the duties of the job. You may be asked by your supervisors or managers to perform other duties. You will be evaluated in part based upon your performance of the tasks listed in this job description.\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb>\u003Ci>Equal Opportunity Statement:\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Ci> All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, or status as a Vietnam or disabled veteran.\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Ci> Applications for employment in the US must have work authorization that does not now or in the future require sponsorship of a visa for employment authorization in the United States and with Peoplevisor, LLC.\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fp>\n\u003C\u002Fdiv>","showExpiredHeader":false,"structuredDataJobSummaryModel":null,"tagModels":null,"viewJobDisplay":"DESKTOP_EMBEDDED"},"sectionedJobInfoModel":null},"mobtk":"1jo83ek53l03i801","profileBaseUrl":"https:\u002F\u002Fprofile.indeed.com","rtl":false,"salaryInfoModel":null},"resumeWordCount":0,"jobDescription":"\u003Cdiv>\u003Cp>Peoplevisor has an exciting opportunity for an experienced Salesforce Commerce Cloud (Demandware) Developer. In this role, the candidate will develop, assist, and lead delivery teams in building projects within Salesforce Commerce Cloud. This candidate is going to have one of the most critical roles in a successful software delivery team, possessing a broad variety of technical and soft skills.\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n\u003Cp>\n \u003Cb>KEY EXPECTATIONS\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n\u003Cul>\n\u003Cli>Implement new features using Salesforce Commerce Cloud (Demandware) scripting language based on JavaScript\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Implement front-end features using jQuery library\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Create and maintain code documentation\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Debug and troubleshoot software defects\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Implements Digital Consumer experiences based on a foundation of SFCC (Salesforce commerce cloud) to meet expected quality standards.\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Participates in Agile sprints and design, develop, test and implement changes as defined by business requirements.\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Implement proofs of concept to prove any new technologies or integration scenarios and identify customization's needed to SFCC platform for meeting client requirements.\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Integrate commerce cloud with 3rd party\u002Fback-end systems leveraging link cartridge\u002FOCAPI\u002Fcustom services while ensuring scalability, performance and coding guidelines.\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Diagnose and solve technical problems during implementation and support phases in a timely manner.\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Help team\u002Fclient with Business Manager configuration and administration.\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Build reusable cartridge\u002Fcomponents.\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Implement build and release management using CI\u002FCD strategies (leveraging tools like Jenkins and\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>DevOps practices), implement Mocha\u002FChai unit and functional test cases in order to reduce costs while ensuring quality.\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Lead discussions with internal business partners to identify needs and translate business requirements into detail functional specifications and technical solutions.\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Communicate efficiently and accurately with the Project Manager and report any progress and\u002For delays.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003C\u002Ful>\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n\u003Cp>\u003Cb>\nDESIRED SKILLS AND EXPERIENCE\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n\u003Cul>\n\u003Cli>Salesforce Certified Commerce Cloud Digital Developer Required\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Computer Science or related field\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>3+ years of developer experience within the Salesforce Commerce Cloud (Demandware)\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>2+ years of experience in a client facing role\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Strong knowledge of JavaScript (both server and client side) and at least one other major programming language\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Experience working in all phases of the software development life-cycle from requirements gathering to final delivery and support\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Solid understanding of basic eCommerce concepts, such as catalog architecture, pricing and inventory management strategies, payment processors, and technologies that support a successful eCommerce strategy such as PIM, OMS, and ERP\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Experience with supporting and\u002For implementing public-facing eCommerce websites\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Strong experience on major eCommerce platforms\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Self-driven and motivated\u003C\u002Fli>\n\u003Cli>Exceptional problem-solving skills and a fantastic attention to 75039","tagModels":null,"taxonomyAttributes":null,"viewJobDisplay":"DESKTOP_EMBEDDED"},"jobMetadataHeaderModel":{"jobType":"Full-time"},"jobTagModel":null,"resumeEvaluationResult":null,"sanitizedJobDescription":"\u003Cdiv>\n \u003Cp>Peoplevisor has an exciting opportunity for an experienced Salesforce Commerce Cloud (Demandware) Developer. In this role, the candidate will develop, assist, and lead delivery teams in building projects within Salesforce Commerce Cloud. This candidate is going to have one of the most critical roles in a successful software delivery team, possessing a broad variety of technical and soft skills.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb>KEY EXPECTATIONS\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Implement new features using Salesforce Commerce Cloud (Demandware) scripting language based on JavaScript\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Implement front-end features using jQuery library\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Create and maintain code documentation\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Debug and troubleshoot software defects\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Implements Digital Consumer experiences based on a foundation of SFCC (Salesforce commerce cloud) to meet expected quality standards.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Participates in Agile sprints and design, develop, test and implement changes as defined by business requirements.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Implement proofs of concept to prove any new technologies or integration scenarios and identify customization's needed to SFCC platform for meeting client requirements.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Integrate commerce cloud with 3rd party\u002Fback-end systems leveraging link cartridge\u002FOCAPI\u002Fcustom services while ensuring scalability, performance and coding guidelines.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Diagnose and solve technical problems during implementation and support phases in a timely manner.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Help team\u002Fclient with Business Manager configuration and administration.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Build reusable cartridge\u002Fcomponents.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Implement build and release management using CI\u002FCD strategies (leveraging tools like Jenkins and\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>DevOps practices), implement Mocha\u002FChai unit and functional test cases in order to reduce costs while ensuring quality.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Lead discussions with internal business partners to identify needs and translate business requirements into detail functional specifications and technical solutions.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Communicate efficiently and accurately with the Project Manager and report any progress and\u002For delays.\u003C\u002Fli>\n \u003C\u002Ful>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb> DESIRED SKILLS AND EXPERIENCE\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Salesforce Certified Commerce Cloud Digital Developer Required\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science or related field\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>3+ years of developer experience within the Salesforce Commerce Cloud (Demandware)\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>2+ years of experience in a client facing role\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Strong knowledge of JavaScript (both server and client side) and at least one other major programming language\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Experience working in all phases of the software development life-cycle from requirements gathering to final delivery and support\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Solid understanding of basic eCommerce concepts, such as catalog architecture, pricing and inventory management strategies, payment processors, and technologies that support a successful eCommerce strategy such as PIM, OMS, and ERP\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Experience with supporting and\u002For implementing public-facing eCommerce websites\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Strong experience on major eCommerce platforms\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Self-driven and motivated\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Exceptional problem-solving skills and a fantastic attention to detail\u003C\u002Fli>\n \u003C\u002Ful>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb>\u003Ci>Employer’s Rights:\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Ci> Peoplevisor, LLC. has the right to revise this job description at any time. This job description is not a contract for employment. This job description does not list all the duties of the job. You may be asked by your supervisors or managers to perform other duties. You will be evaluated in part based upon your performance of the tasks listed in this job description.\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb>\u003Ci>Equal Opportunity Statement:\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Ci> All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, or status as a Vietnam or disabled veteran.\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Ci> Applications for employment in the US must have work authorization that does not now or in the future require sponsorship of a visa for employment authorization in the United States and with Peoplevisor, LLC.\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fp>\n\u003C\u002Fdiv>","showExpiredHeader":false,"structuredDataJobSummaryModel":null,"tagModels":null,"viewJobDisplay":"DESKTOP_EMBEDDED"},"sectionedJobInfoModel":null},"mobtk":"1jo83ek53l03i801","profileBaseUrl":"https:\u002F\u002Fprofile.indeed.com","rtl":false,"salaryInfoModel":null},"jobDescription":"\u003Cdiv>\u003Cp>Peoplevisor has an exciting opportunity for an experienced Salesforce Commerce Cloud (Demandware) Developer.             window.addEventListener('pageshow', function(e) {
                if (window.performance && typeof window.performance.getEntriesByType === 'function') {

                    window['_bk'] = '1';
                }

        <script>
            window.signals_transport = window.signals_transport || {
                emitSignal: function(data){
                    window.signals_transport_tmp = window.signals_transport_tmp || [];
                    if (window.signals_transport_tmp.length < 1000) {
                        window.signals_transport_tmp.push(data);
                    }
                },
                configure: function(config){
                    window.signals_transport_config_tmp = config;
                    window.signals_transport_disconnect_tmp = undefined;
                },
                disconnect: function(){
                    window.signals_transport_disconnect_tmp = true;
                }
            };
        </script>

style="height:800px"><style>
                            @keyframes fadeOutAnimationKeyframes {
                                from {
                                    opacity: 1;
                                }
                                to {
                                    opacity: 0;
                                }
                            }

                            @keyframes fadeInAnimationKeyframes {
                                from {
                                    opacity: 0;
                                }
                                to {
                                    opacity: 1;
                                }
                            }

                            @keyframes moveUpAnimationKeyframes {
                                from {
                                    transform: translateY(0);
                                }
                                to {
                                    transform: translateY(-0px);
                                }
                            }

                            @keyframes moveDownAnimationKeyframes {
                                from {
                                    transform: translateY(-0px);
                                }
                                to {
                                    transform: translateY(0);
                                }
                            }

                            @keyframes embeddedViewJobMoveUpAnimationKeyframes {
                                from {
                                    margin-top: 0px;
                                }
                                to {
                                    margin-top: -15px
                                }
                            }

                            @keyframes jobTitleMoveUpAnimationKeyframes {
                                from {
                                    transform: scale(1) translateY(0px);
                                    transform-origin: 0 0;
                                }
                                to {
                                    transform: scale(0.9) translateY(-0px);
                                    transform-origin: 0 0;
                                }
                            }

                            @keyframes jobTitleMoveDownAnimationKeyframes {
                                from {
                                    transform: scale(0.9) translateY(-0px);
                                    transform-origin: 0 0;
                                }
                                to {
                                    transform: scale(1) translateY(0px);
                                    transform-origin: 0 0;
                                }
                            }

id="mosaic-aboveExtractedJobDescription" class="mosaic mosaic-empty-zone"></div><div id="jobDescriptionTitle"><h2 tabindex="-1" id="jobDescriptionTitleHeading" class="css-15dd00f e1tiznh50">Full job description</h2></div><div id="jobDescriptionText" class="jobsearch-JobComponent-description css-jsfa0i eu4oa1w0"><div>
 <p>Peoplevisor has an exciting opportunity for an experienced Salesforce Commerce Cloud (Demandware) Developer. In this role, the candidate will develop, assist, and lead delivery teams in building projects within Salesforce Commerce Cloud. This candidate is going to have one of the most critical roles in a successful software delivery team, possessing a broad variety of technical and soft skills.</p>
 <br>
 <p></p>
 <p><b>KEY EXPECTATIONS</b></p>
 <br>
 <p></p>
 <ul>
  <li>Implement new features using Salesforce Commerce Cloud (Demandware) scripting language based on JavaScript</li>
  <li>Implement front-end features using jQuery library</li>
  <li>Create and maintain code documentation</li>
  <li>Debug and troubleshoot software defects</li>
  <li>Implements Digital Consumer experiences based on a foundation of SFCC (Salesforce commerce cloud) to meet expected quality standards.</li>
  <li>Participates in Agile sprints and design, develop, test and implement changes as defined by business requirements.</li>
  <li>Implement proofs of concept to prove any new technologies or integration scenarios and identify customization's needed to SFCC platform for meeting client requirements.</li>
  <li>Integrate commerce cloud with 3rd party/back-end systems leveraging link cartridge/OCAPI/custom services while ensuring scalability, performance and coding guidelines.</li>
  <li>Diagnose and solve technical problems during implementation and support phases in a timely manner.</li>
  <li>Help team/client with Business Manager configuration and administration.</li>
  <li>Build reusable cartridge/components.</li>
  <li>Implement build and release management using CI/CD strategies (leveraging tools like Jenkins and</li>
  <li>DevOps practices), implement Mocha/Chai unit and functional test cases in order to reduce costs while ensuring quality.</li>
  <li>Lead discussions with internal business partners to identify needs and translate business requirements into detail functional specifications and technical solutions.</li>
  <li>Communicate efficiently and accurately with the Project Manager and report any progress and/or delays.</li>
 </ul>
 <br>
 <p></p>
 <p><b> DESIRED SKILLS AND EXPERIENCE</b></p>
 <br>
 <p></p>
 <ul>
  <li>Salesforce Certified Commerce Cloud Digital Developer Required</li>
  <li>Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science or related field</li>
  <li>3+ years of developer experience within the Salesforce Commerce Cloud (Demandware)</li>
  <li>2+ years of experience in a client facing role</li>
  <li>Strong knowledge of JavaScript (both server and client side) and at least one other major programming language</li>
  <li>Experience working in all phases of the software development life-cycle from requirements gathering to final delivery and support</li>
  <li>Solid understanding of basic eCommerce concepts, such as catalog architecture, pricing and inventory management strategies, payment processors, and technologies that support a successful eCommerce strategy such as PIM, OMS, and ERP</li>
  <li>Experience with supporting and/or implementing public-facing eCommerce websites</li>
  <li>Strong experience on major eCommerce platforms</li>
  <li>Self-driven and motivated</li>
  <li>Exceptional problem-solving skills and a fantastic attention to detail</li>
 </ul>
 <br>
 <p></p>
 <p><b><i>Employer’s Rights:</i></b></p>
 <br>
 <p></p>
 <p><i> Peoplevisor, LLC. has the right to revise this job description at any time. This job description is not a contract for employment. This job description does not list all the duties of the job. You may be asked by your supervisors or managers to perform other duties. You will be evaluated in part based upon your performance of the tasks listed in this job description.</i></p>
 <br>
 <p></p>
 <p><b><i>Equal Opportunity Statement:</i></b></p>
 <br>
 <p></p>
 <p><i> All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, or status as a Vietnam or disabled veteran.</i></p>
 <br>
 <p></p>
 <p><i> Applications for employment in the US must have work authorization that does not now or in the future require sponsorship of a visa for employment authorization in the United States and with Peoplevisor, LLC.</i></p>
</div></div><div role="separator" aria-orientation="horizontal" class="serp-page-1f63e20 e15p7aqh1"><span class="serp-page-8u2krs esbq1260"><span>&amp;nbsp;</span></span></div></div><div .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs{box-sizing:border-box;background:none;appearance:none;text-align:start;text-decoration:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;user-select:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative;margin-block-start:0;margin-block-end:0;margin-inline-start:0;margin-inline-end:0;padding-inline-start:1rem;padding-inline-end:1rem;line-height:1.5;font-family:\u0027Indeed
